MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Armstrong for Edward G. Dodson (Petitioner/Administrator).

Mr. Armstrong addressed the Court regarding the verification issue. He stated that he was in the process of obtaining the correct verification for the Court and requested additional time to complete the correction. The matter was continued to September 17, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerks: Jackie Alameda/Sajja Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
